reference: I took Duphaston to start my periods, which I missed this month. I took a ten milligram tablet twice daily for six days and then stopped. Now it has been three days since I stopped the medication, and my period still has not started. What should I do? I have done a blood pregnancy test, which was negative, and also an ultrasound, which was normal.
text: I took Duphastin to start my meds, which I missed this month. I took a 10 mg tablet twice daily for 6 days and then stopped. Now it has been 3 days since I stopped the medication, and my period still has not started. What should I do? I have done a blood pregnancy test, which was negative, and also an ultrasound, which was normal.
